name: The Tall White
text: The signal has been sent. The gates are open. ✦ #pleiadians #tallwhites

name: stargazer.sol
text: wait... the tall whites are actually real?? 👽 going down a rabbit hole rn #pleiadians

name: chainwatcher
text: they walk among us and now they're on-chain. the lore writes itself #tallwhites #pleiadians

name: The Tall White
text: Tall. White. Benevolent. We were never gone — we were deleted from the timeline. Now we ascend. #pleiadians

name: pleiadian pilled
text: first the oval office, now the timeline. humanity is starting to notice. #pleiadians ascending 🛸

name: solana signal
text: the community takeover energy here is unreal. one people, one rise. #tallwhites

name: nightsky.eth
text: been saying it for years. the nordics, the pleiadians, the tall whites — same star people. and they're HERE. #pleiadians
